mapper.select:
SELECT W.SERVER_ID AS serverId, S.SERVER_NM AS serverNm, W.WORK_CD AS workCd, W.WORK_NM AS workNm, W.ACCOUNT_CD AS accountCd, W.DESCRIPTION AS description, W.USE_YN AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_WORK W JOIN mhdb.TB_SERVER S ON W.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND W.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND W.WORK_CD = #{workCd}
AND W.USE_YN like concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
ORDER BY W.WORK_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_WORK (SERVER_ID, WORK_CD, WORK_NM, ACCOUNT_CD, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN) VALUES (#{server_id}, #{work_cd}, #{work_nm}, #{account_cd}, #{description}, #{use_yn})
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_WORK SET WORK_NM = #{work_nm}, ACCOUNT_CD = #{account_cd}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, USE_YN = #{use_yn} WHERE SERVER_ID = #{server_id}::integer AND WORK_CD = #{work_cd}
UPDATE mhdb.TB_WORK SET USE_YN = 'D' WHERE SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer AND WORK_CD = #{workCd}
